title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Oil India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Oil India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Oil India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Oil India:
Oil India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oil India!
